_note: The game's art skins — ONE source of truth. `key` is the folder name under shared_data/art/; `label` shows in the Options picker (web + Godot); `prompt` is the style suffix the art generator appends. To ADD A SKIN: add an entry here, then run `cd ai_art_server && uv run python -m wordplay_art.bake` to generate all its assets (monsters, tombstones, boons, logo).

styles.label: Storybook
styles.prompt: soft painterly storybook children's-book illustration, gouache texture, warm gentle colors, soft rounded shapes, whimsical, hand-drawn, friendly, plain soft cream background

styles.label: Flat sticker
styles.prompt: flat vector sticker illustration, bold clean black outlines, vibrant flat colors, plain white background

styles.label: Enamel pin
styles.prompt: glossy enamel pin game icon, thick gold metal outline, saturated colors, subtle gradient shading, plain white background

styles.label: Pixel art
styles.prompt: 16-bit pixel art game sprite, crisp blocky pixels, limited retro palette, plain dark slate background

styles.label: Woodcut
styles.prompt: black and white woodcut engraving, bold ink linework, cross-hatching, high contrast, plain white background
